All critical data fields (invoice_number, vendor_gstin, total_amount) were successfully extracted. All HIGH priority checks (A2, B1, B7, C1, C2, E3) passed, indicating no hard violations such as duplicate invoices, invalid GSTINs, GST type inconsistencies, arithmetic errors, or unapproved vendors. No explicit 'REGULATORY CONFLICT' was found in any check findings. The average confidence across all non-skipped checks is 0.980, which is well above the 0.70 threshold for escalation. All MEDIUM priority checks (A1, D1, D2) passed without ambiguity, specifically noting that TDS is not applicable due to the GTA forward charge exception under section 194C. The invoice total amount of Rs 47,250.00 does not exceed the high-value threshold of Rs 10,00,000. One LOW priority check (E1) was skipped because no PO amount was present on the invoice, which is not a material failure requiring escalation.
